title: Waiting Screen
description: this mod adds a waiting screen to wait for players to connect to servers or events.
body:
# ⌛Waiting Screen⌛

##   How to use the mod.

## English

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>
  
/waitingscreen background (image) This command changes the image of the waiting screen.
  
/waitingscreen on/off Activates or deactivates the waiting screen.

/waitingscreen color title/count (color) Change the color of the title text.

/waitingscreen team except (team_name) It prevents players on the team from seeing the waiting screen. 

/waitingscreen forplayers true/false activates the waiting for (players) below.

/waitingscreen count (number) Configure the maximum number of players on the waiting screen.


</details>

## Español

<details>
<summary>Comandos</summary>
  
/waitingscreen background (image) Este comando cambia la imagen de atras del waiting screen.
  
/waitingscreen on/off Activa o desactiva la waiting screen.

/waitingscreen color title/count (color) Cambia el color de los textos.

/waitingscreen team except (team_name) Previene a los jugadores de un team ver la waiting screen. 

/waitingscreen forplayers true/false activa El texto que muestra las personas que faltan.

/waitingscreen count (number) Cambia el numero maximo de personas osea el 0/100.


</details>




- English: to change the background image go to config/waitingscreen/(PNG image here).
  
- It also tells you which players not joined the server (only works with a whitelist).
  
- Español: para cambiar la imagen del background anda a config/waitingscreen/(imagen png aqui)

- Ademas te dice que personas no se unen al server (solo funciona con whitelist).
